Package ecarx.carext.connect.oncall

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Call
    Represents a call.
    IOnCall
    Call the call center for help.
    IOnCall.ICallListener
    Call listener.
    IOnCallCenter
    This class provides the primary API for managing call center.
    RescueInfo
    Represents a rescue.

    Class Description

    OnCall center function entry.

    OnCall function entry.
